title: cordyline terminalis var. sieberi
intro: Cordyline terminalis var. sieberi, also known as Cabbage Palm or Tassels Palm, is a species of plant that is native to the eastern coast of Australia and is commonly used in traditional herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Cordyline terminalis var. sieberi include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits associated with consuming Cordyline terminalis var. sieberi include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal medicine, Cordyline terminalis var. sieberi is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used topically in the form of a salve or cream.
